mapper.select: /* adm-master-owner-sql-oracle.xml - checkOwnerCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = UPPER(#{owkey})

/* adm-master-owner-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkOwner */ SELECT A.OWKEY , A.OWNM , A.REGNO , A.BIZTYPE , A.BIZCTG , A.TEL1 , A.TEL2 , A.FAX , A.CONTACT , A.CEO , A.DIMENSIONUOM , A.WEIGHTUOM , A.UDF1 , A.UDF2 , A.UDF3 , A.BOXTYPE , A.LAKEY , A.CURRTYPE , A.BARCODETYPE , A.DELSTTVRFTYPE , A.ALWMXDYN , A.DFTORISHPGLOCCD , A.DFTDESTSHPGLOCCD , A.BILLTOCUSTCD , A.EMAIL , A.WEBURL , A.UOMTYPE , A.MASTERUPDATEIMPOS , A.CARTYPE , A.LOGGRPCD , A.DIVCD , A.CORP1ID , A.CORP2ID , A.EXTCD1 , A.EXTCD2 , A.CUSTTYPE , A.MEMOID , A.ADDRID , ADDR.LAT , ADDR.LON , A.STATUSCD , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY , A.ZIPCD AS ZIPNO , A.ADDR1 AS LNMADRES , A.ZIPCD , A.ADDR1 , A.ADDR2 , A.DELYN FROM TADMIN_MST_OW A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T ADDR ON A.ADDRID = ADDR.ADDRID WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey}
